---
title : "Latin {{American Political Culture}} and {{Citizenship Norms}}"
date : "2021-01-01"
author : "Miranda, Daniel; Miranda, Catalina & Munoz, Loreto"
categories : ["Book Section"]
publication : "  In Ernesto Treviño, Diego Carrasco, Ellen Claes & Kerry J. Kennedy: Good {{Citizenship}} for the {{Next Generation}}, 12 89--105 . Cham: Springer International Publishing [https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-75746-5_6](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-75746-5_6). ISBN: 978-3-030-75745-8 978-3-030-75746-5"
publication_short : "  In Ernesto Treviño, Diego Carrasco, Ellen Claes & Kerry J. Kennedy: Good {{Citizenship}} for the {{Next Generation}}, 12 89--105 . Cham: Springer International Publishing [https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-75746-5_6](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-75746-5_6). ISBN: 978-3-030-75745-8 978-3-030-75746-5"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Miranda, Daniel; Miranda, Catalina & Munoz, Loreto (2021). *Latin {{American Political Culture}} and {{Citizenship Norms}}*.   In Ernesto Treviño, Diego Carrasco, Ellen Claes & Kerry J. Kennedy: Good {{Citizenship}} for the {{Next Generation}}, 12 89--105 . Cham: Springer International Publishing [https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-75746-5_6](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-75746-5_6). ISBN: 978-3-030-75745-8 978-3-030-75746-5

:::
